institution.name: School of the Art Institute of Chicago

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at School of the Art Institute of Chicago are 32% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($40.2k vs $58.7k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at School of the Art Institute of Chicago fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (43.0% → 37.2%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at School of the Art Institute of Chicago fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at School of the Art Institute of Chicago are 50% above 6-year earnings ($26.7k → $40.2k).
